title: Al-Muhallab and the War against the Azraqites
description: According to Hishim-Abu Mikhnaf-Abu Zuhayr al-'Absi: AlMuhallab and In Mikhnaf moved against the Azraqites in Rimhurmuz, in accordance with the letter of al-Hajjij to them, on Monday, r9 Sha'bin 75 (December 13, 694.112 They ejected them from Rimhurmuz without much fighting, advancing slowly against them and driving them off. The Azraqite forces retreated as if they were the rearguard of a defeated army, and moved to a region of Sabur called Kazarun.1 13 Al-Muhallab and 'Abd al-Rabman b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
